---
title: "misc"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-06"
---

```{r}
bg_cd4_mde <- data.frame(
  cell = colnames(so_orig)[so_orig$annotation_level1 == "CD4"],
  Embeddings(so_orig[["mde_incremental_level2"]])[so_orig$annotation_level1 == "CD4", 1:2]
)

colnames(bg_cd4_mde) <- c("cell", "MDE_1", "MDE_2")

saveRDS(bg_cd4_mde, "inst/extdata/immgenT_CD4_MDE_background.rds")

immgenTCD4MDE <- function(data = NULL,
                          alpha = 0.25,
                          size = 0.15,
                          color = "grey70",
                          raster = TRUE) {
  
  if (is.null(data)) {
    data <- readRDS(system.file(
      "extdata",
      "immgenT_CD4_MDE_background.rds",
      package = "ZemmourLib"
    ))
  }
  
  if (raster && requireNamespace("ggrastr", quietly = TRUE)) {
    ggrastr::geom_point_rast(
      data = data,
      mapping = ggplot2::aes(x = MDE_1, y = MDE_2),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = color,
      alpha = alpha,
      size = size
    )
  } else {
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = data,
      mapping = ggplot2::aes(x = MDE_1, y = MDE_2),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = color,
      alpha = alpha,
      size = size
    )
  }
}

ggplot() +
  immgenTCD4MDE() +
  geom_point(data = query_df, aes(x = MDE_1, y = MDE_2, color = level2_final))
```
